en: You ever came across somebody who had the same backpack as you?
ko: 같은 가방 메고 있는 사람 만난 적 있어요?

en: Because it can either go both ways. Encounter A.
Bro, it's actually really cool that we have the same backpack. Yeah, man, we're twins.
What class are you going to right now? And Encounter B.
ko: 지금 무슨 수업 가? 그리고 상황 B.

en: Hey, he's copying my entire float. Word for word, bar for bar.
ko: 야, 쟤가 내 스타일 전부 따라 하잖아.

en: Bro, I've been having this. You're copying me, if anything. What's next, the shoes?
ko: 야, 나 이거 원래부터 가지고 있었거든.

en: There can only be one. Oh, no, come here. Yeah, don't be Encounter B.
ko: 야, 이리 와. 네, 상황 B가 되지 마세요.
